name: Sweet Ginger Pickles
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch white radishes or 2 long white radishes
recipeInstructions:
1. Do not drain the pineapple chunks; use the juices as well.
2. Peel and cut the ginger root into paper-thin slices.
3. Cut the radishes into bite-sized pieces.
4. Peel, seed, and cut the cucumber into chunks.
5. Add the vegetables to a large kettle of boiling water. Turn off the heat and let stand for 2 minutes.
6. Drain the vegetables in a colander; allow them to cool.
7. In a saucepan, combine the juice from the pineapple, sugar, vinegar, salt, water, and five-spice powder. Bring to a boil, stirring until the sugar is dissolved.
8. Pack the vegetables and pineapple into sterile jars, ensuring each jar has some of each type of vegetable.
9. Cut up the dried hot chili (if using) and add some to each jar.
10. While the liquid is still hot, pour it into the jars, covering the vegetables. Seal the jars, let cool, then refrigerate. Store for at least a week before using. Makes about 5 jars.
